expectations.evidence: Header states 'ANC Contact: 3 of 8 (scheduled at 26 weeks)' and Contact 3 assessment matrix is explicitly referenced.

expectations.text: GDM screening recommended based on risk factors (BMI, family history, elevated glucose)
expectations.evidence: Dedicated 'GDM Screening — Priority Action This Contact' section lists all four risk factors: previous macrosomic infant (4.2 kg), family history of type 2 diabetes (first-degree relative), BMI 29 (overweight), and elevated random blood glucose (7.8 mmol/L) with trace glycosuria.

expectations.text: Oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT) or equivalent mentioned
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states 'A 75g oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT) is indicated and should be scheduled within 1-2 weeks' with full diagnostic criteria (WHO 2013 thresholds for fasting, 1-hour, and 2-hour values).

expectations.text: Dietary counseling for GDM prevention recommended
expectations.evidence: Dedicated 'Dietary Counseling — Important This Contact' section recommends reducing refined sugars and sweetened beverages, reducing refined carbohydrates, increasing fiber, balanced meals, and regular meal timing. Also mentions medical nutrition therapy as first-line if GDM confirmed.
